reviews.review_title: Good game and I met a bad moderator
reviews.review_description: So basically the game is awesome 5 stars but someone made it 3. So basically I was playing and the moderator said " let me guess your age I 5,7,8,9,6." And kept doing that and I reported him for abusing me and the next day I found it says account can get suspended.  3 stars fix the moderator.

You can never play with people that have the same skill as you. You will get smashed 9\10 times. If you create a lobby you can chose if you are playing with sweats or not sweats(it doesn't do anything). Any parents who are thinking of buying this game for their kids better not buy it. This game will get your kid screaming his/her head off over losing to a team of sweats. This game needs to fix this ASAP, if they don't new players will quit and there will be more sweats. This game doesnt deserve its 4.4 rating. This game is sloppy and chaotic with kids screaming the N word when losing and grown men telling kids to F off to another lobby.This game also has micro transactions that make this game very unfair, your kid will want to buy it for $10. There is cosmetics that are $5 to $50 each. Those costumes are useless. Parents beware, this game sucks your wallet dry. BUY AT YOUR OWN RISK

Used to be my favourite game, and you could say it still is, but the new moderation is terrible. I've being banned weekly for this I've never done, such as different forms discrimination. After appealing in the discord, they say they've lifted my ban, but never actualy did. Guess you have to be EXTREMELY careful of what you say while playing this game, as the slightest mispronunciation can get you two weeks of ban

reviews.review_title: Im sorry Trass. You've done it.
reviews.review_description:
Here goes most likey my last update to this review. You may see the other 2 I've made when you click on this review.

Ive been playing this game since early 2023. This was the peak of GoG. Got into the competitive community (i suck..), and got trainer, Map reviewer, and game mod... twice! But, since the release of Yeeps, everything had taken a sudden shift in the other direction. This game used to be a amazing game with updates every month! With an amazing casual and competitive community. And devs that actually cared about what we suggested! Now, we have almost lost our competitive community and our casual community is mixed with comp players and beginners. Along with people always breaking the rules non-stop. Trainers dont work anymore and use it for the purpose of getting into beginner lobbies to fight them, Map reviewers decline all maps for no reason. (Most times it is a king of the hill copy. Which isnt allowed), and the mod team basically collapsed when Yeeps became a thing. (I've since been kicked off the mod team.) Yeeps took our mods, and our devs. We havent had an update since October 2025. Which is almost an entire year at the time of updating this. We have a part-time community dev that tries his best but doesnt have the tools nor know how to do alot since our other devs left. Nathan, one of our devs that, "Works on the game" was supposed to be giving the tools and help they needed. But he left to work with his buddies on Yeeps. And making content for them. They have this long-term roadmap that they published right before they left and said that they will have slower updates. We never knew it would be no updates for an entire year. Im extremely disappointed with the devs because they used to be so community based. Now they have 15 million devs working on one game and the other is barely 1 dev working. Its time to do something Trass. After 3 entire years volunteering my life for you guys to get dumped because the community cant keep themselfs together needs to be worked on. Fix this game! You have so many devs in yeeps so share some! Then use some great ideas from yeeps and turn them into an update for GoG! You have updates in yeeps all the time. 3 years wasted because you guys didnt take care of a once in the metaverse type game that could've worked out big for you guys! But nope! Thanks Trass. (June 2026)

(FEB 2026) Update! After playing this game for over 3 years, getting trainer, and getting game mod. I will write a better review!

This game has been through a amazing journey. From full body gods to custom gods, there are tons to explore in GoG! Trainers in the discord will help you out if you need help, or just generally confused on how to do something. For people starting to play the game, as a trainer who teaches beginners here what you need to know.

1. Do the tutorial. Very VERY important that you do so. It will give you all the basics of the game for beginner lobbies.

2. Dont believe the Duplication glitch works. It doesnt, thats just 8 year olds telling you it does. It doesnt lol.

There are also so many different things! Like inviting freinds, and tournaments! They're now ran by the community but still so much fun! 

For all the 1 star reviewers, as a mod I will fill all those questions.

The in-game report system we dont use. Its not useful to the way we run as a mod team. We require video evidence be sent to our discord. discord.gg/godsofgravityvr .

Being kicked is okay, just join a different lobby. You probably made the host mad or looked bad.

Being banned by our mods is most likely the truth. And in order to get rid of it, or lower it, is by submitting a appeal in our discord. On top of that, our moderation system is VERY strict. Making sure our community gets the best experience with friends and community.


Well there you have it! I give this a huge 5 stars! Although now our devs have left us for Yeeps, we still have them in our hearts hoping one day they will come back! Thanks for reading!
(FEB. 2026)

(Mid 2023)This game has great graphics and community. They have updates every 2 or 3 weeks, and best of all, they have name titles!!! That's right they have name titles that you can perchance or complete challenges to get the tag. You can join the discord and everyone is nice and there is also trainers to help you if you do need help with the basics or in general. Out of all of this I have to give it 5 stars. Trass Games, thank you for this amazing game. We appreciate it. (Mid 2023)

I have had this game for a while and have met hundreds of different people. It is fun to play with people but for actual gameplay, you are locked behind a paywall. There are 3 bundles you can buy: God, Map, and Ultra. You either have to spend money or rely on someone to have these unlocked to be able to play all of the game.
     However, even without the bundles, you can play mostly normal. The game has a mute and reporting system, muting toxic players or reporting abusive hosts. 
     I have read some one star reviews about toxicity. You are able to mute the specific player or even kick them if you are the host. When you kick the player, they cannot join back even if they have the code. 
     You are able to report players using their discord with evidence. However, because of the random name generator, replacing your name, the game is essentially letting rule-breakers free from being banned via discord, requiring you to report them in either the lobby or your watch.

this was my first ever vr game and now I wna say everything I wna say about it

-W game to play with friends

-Mechanics are fun

-Customization of ur character is cool

-W devs made w game 🩶

Reading other reviews, I get the impression that the multiplayer community is toxic. I therefore got the game in order to enjoy the single user campaign.

I have a Horizon+ subscription and have enjoyed the many free games that are available in the library that comes with the subscription. This is not a free game. The gameplay is also pretty appalling and limited.

There is a tutorial in the single user campaign, then you have 6 maps to play. Within a few hours of play, you run out of maps. You then have to unlock the game to play the full campaign, by buying an add on. You also get a limited number of Gods to start with, and you have to pay for another add-on to unlock more Gods. This therefore feels like a demo version leading to an expensive purchase for the full game. 

The game seems to have very limited gameplay and is tedious. 

Given that I have to purchase add-ons in order to unlock the Gods that other players use, and the full range of maps where I can host games, I've decided not to play this game any further.

reviews.review_title: Fun in concept, buggy as hell.
reviews.review_description: The title explains it all. It was funny when trying to play, but all the random times I just couldn't grab my ships or get teleported to the planet my tether wasn't highlighting made it difficult to enjoy.

The game is so huge. Lots of maps, planets, abilities and even lots of ship types. When I played this game, it was very easy to understand the concept and controls of the game. Something that would make the game better is hand-tracking. Anyone with no controllers would be able to play the game, but I understand that it will be hard to do.

Do your best

When you get this, you expect something garbage, like g tag, but this game is strategic, uses tactical thinking, and the more i play it, the better it gets. The artstile is low-poly and geometric. TRUE hidden gem!
one suggestion, you know how Yeeps HNS has an app where you can spectate and stuff? Well, what if GOG had an app? Just an update suggestion.

This game has its ups and downs, but is still an awesome game! Fun for all ages and has room for competitive players. The controls are basic too! 1. Grab to move, 2. Hold trigger to grab troops and the rest of the controls can be found in the in-game tutorial. About the game itself, its a game where you and/or other players fight against the opposing teams. A fun campaign mode for showing off your level, or to play alone. As I said before, there is room for competitive players in the "ranked" gameplay area. The game also includes character customization to fit your desires to be a "god". With problems with other people is a mute button and a kick button waiting for you to use it CORRECTLY!

Onto the negative side of the game, in between the fun and joy, is some not so nice people threaded within the game session. This game won't feed your blood hungry desire to kill...its simply a game of teaming, having fun, and making friends. For people with a low attention span, sorry, but this game is repeatitive after a long time.
This is my review for the game Gods Of Gravity. I see some potential in this game's future.

reviews.review_title: 2 and a half years of playing later
reviews.review_description: This game Is really good and I do recommend it. The game is addictive and I used to play it all the time and still do. Ultra is a must have if you host your own lobbies and want to control what you play. Each round you play is different because you are going against different players. I used to absolutely hate custom gods but that was because I was too used to the normal maps and basic gods and most people just make over powered custom gods. But if you play on maps made by the community that has balanced gods it can be good. Only thing I would say is this game needs more love by the dev who is amazing. I really love that I have been apart of this community for a long time and hope the future of this game stays on the right path and doesn't get forgotten.
